Title: Implement Core Game Loop
Description: Draw → Play → Fight → Win loop. Every turn, draw one card. Play one card to attack, defend, or cast a spell. Win by reducing opponent's HP to zero or making them run out of cards to draw.

Title: Design Hero Classes
Description: Design six unique hero classes: Necromancer, Warrior, Rogue, Druid, Engineer, Ranger. Each with five unique cards (no duplicates, no filler).

Title: Implement Mana System
Description: Five mana types: Shadow, Steel, Life, Wind, Earth. Each card has one mana type. Mana refills one of each type every turn. No random draws, no mana screw.

Title: Implement Win/Loss Conditions
Description: Win: reduce opponent's HP to 0 OR make them draw from empty deck. Lose: your HP hits 0 OR you draw from empty deck.

Title: Create Tutorial Structure
Description: Five-step tutorial: 1) Draw, 2) Mana, 3) Fight, 4) Deck, 5) Win. Each step ends with a card gift. No buttons, no menus.

Title: Implement AI Opponent
Description: AI plays predictably at first (safe, kind). After 5 wins, learns to block, save big cards, play smart. Never cheats, never has more cards. Gives new card after defeat.

Title: Design Card Progression
Description: Earn one new card after every match (not by grinding or luck). Cards are gifts from the game, representing growth.

Title: Implement Combat System
Description: Visual combat: cards strike, health bars drop, creatures rise from grave. No hidden numbers. Everything visible and intuitive.

Title: Implement Card Reward System
Description: Give one new card as a gift after each tutorial step and after every victory. The card is a symbol of player growth.

Title: Implement Deck Management
Description: No random card draws. Mana refills predictably. Players always have the tools they need but never all at once. Requires planning and flow.

Title: Design Necromancer Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Necromancer: 1) Bone Golem (Taunt, Deathrattle: Summon 1 Bone), 2) Soul Leech (Lifesteal, Cost: 3 Shadow), 3) Raise Dead (Summon 2 1/1 Skeletons), 4) Dark Pact (Sacrifice 1 friendly minion to gain 5 HP), 5) Plague Bearer (AoE 2 damage, 2 mana, Poison)

Title: Design Warrior Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Warrior: 1) Battle Cry (Deal 3 damage to a random enemy), 2) Shield Wall (Give all minions +2 Armor), 3) War Horn (Give all minions +1 Attack), 4) Two-Handed Smash (Deal 6 damage to a minion, costs 5 Steel), 5) Last Stand (If HP <= 1, deal 10 damage to all enemies)

Title: Design Rogue Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Rogue: 1) Quick Draw (Draw 2 cards), 2) Backstab (Deal 4 damage to a damaged minion), 3) Smoke Bomb (All enemy minions lose 1 Attack until end of turn), 4) Poisoned Dagger (Weapon, 1 Attack, 1 Durability, Steal 2 HP on hit), 5) Shadow Step (Move a friendly minion to another position)

Title: Design Druid Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Druid: 1) Wild Growth (Gain 1 Mana Crystal this turn), 2) Animal Companion (Summon a 3/3 with random ability), 3) Tranquility (Heal all friendly minions for 3), 4) Treant (3/3, Taunt, Windfury), 5) Moonfire (Deal 1 damage, Cost: 1 Life)

Title: Design Engineer Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Engineer: 1) Repair Bot (Heal a friendly minion for 3), 2) Turret (2/3, Reach), 3) Overclock (Double Attack of a minion this turn), 4) Scrap Metal (Draw a card, discard a card), 5) Bomb (Deal 4 damage, random target)

Title: Design Ranger Class - 5 Cards
Description: Design 5 cards for Ranger: 1) Long Shot (Deal 4 damage to a minion at range), 2) Animal Call (Summon a 2/2 Wolf), 3) Traps (Place 3 traps. One triggers when enemy plays a card), 4) Swift Strike (Deal 2 damage, then draw a card), 5) Camouflage (Make a friendly minion Stealth until next turn)

Title: Implement Shadow Mana System
Description: Implement Shadow mana type. Used by Necromancer. Can only be spent on death-related effects. Refills 1 per turn.

Title: Implement Steel Mana System
Description: Implement Steel mana type. Used by Warrior. Can only be spent on armor and weapon effects. Refills 1 per turn.

Title: Implement Life Mana System
Description: Implement Life mana type. Used by Druid. Can only be spent on healing and nature effects. Refills 1 per turn.

Title: Implement Wind Mana System
Description: Implement Wind mana type. Used by Ranger. Can only be spent on speed and mobility effects. Refills 1 per turn.

Title: Implement Earth Mana System
Description: Implement Earth mana type. Used by Engineer. Can only be spent on constructs and traps. Refills 1 per turn.

Title: Implement Card JSON Schema
Description: Implement full card JSON schema as defined in TECH_ARCH.md. Validate all cards against schema on load. Include versioning and SHA256 integrity checks.

Title: Implement Game Loop Module (Blueprint)
Description: Implement core game loop in UE5 Blueprint: turn management, draw phase, play phase, combat phase, end phase. Communicate state via events.

Title: Implement Combat Module (Blueprint)
Description: Implement combat system in UE5 Blueprint: attack resolution, damage calculation, death events, animation triggers. Use visual feedback for all actions.

Title: Implement AI Module (C++)
Description: Implement AI decision system in C++. Use state machine + weighted heuristic. Feed game state via JSON snapshot. Return actions as array of commands.

Title: Implement Matchmaking Module (C++)
Description: Implement matchmaking system using Redis. Queue players by skill, latency, class preference. Match within 15s. Fallback to AI.

Title: Implement UI Module (Blueprint)
Description: Implement card UI: hand, board, mana bar, turn counter, tooltip. Support tap, swipe, pinch. Mobile and desktop responsive.

Title: Implement WebGL Build Pipeline
Description: Configure UE5 project for WebGL export: ETC2 compression, WASM build, asset chunking, code stripping. Test on Chrome, Safari, Firefox. Target 60fps on mid-tier mobile.

Title: Implement Tutorial System (Blueprint)
Description: Implement 5-step tutorial: 1) Draw 5 cards, 2) Play card with 1 mana, 3) Attack with minion, 4) End turn, 5) Win. Each step ends with card gift. No UI buttons.

Title: Implement Mobile Responsive UI
Description: Implement adaptive layout: vertical stack for mobile, horizontal board for desktop. Touch targets 48x48px. Gesture support: swipe, pinch, hold. Reduce effects on low-RAM devices.

Title: Implement Save System
Description: Implement save system using IndexedDB. Encrypt with AES-256 using OpenArcade JWT key. Sync with OpenArcade Auth API. Handle offline changes, conflict resolution, backup.

Title: Implement Audio/SFX/Music System
Description: Implement placeholder audio: card play sound, attack sound, win/lose jingle, ambient music. Use OGG format. Trigger via events in Blueprint.

Title: Implement CI/CD Pipeline
Description: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD: test card schema, test WebGL build, run unit tests, deploy to staging on PR merge. Auto-deploy to prod on tag.

Title: Implement GitHub PR Workflow
Description: Establish PR workflow: 1) Branch from main, 2) Add task ID to PR title, 3) Assign reviewers (2), 4) Pass CI, 5) Merge to main. No direct commits to main.

Title: Art: Necromancer Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Necromancer: Bone Golem, Soul Leech, Raise Dead, Dark Pact, Plague Bearer. Style: dark fantasy, gothic, bone textures.

Title: Art: Warrior Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Warrior: Battle Cry, Shield Wall, War Horn, Two-Handed Smash, Last Stand. Style: heavy metal, armor, battle scars.

Title: Art: Rogue Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Rogue: Quick Draw, Backstab, Smoke Bomb, Poisoned Dagger, Shadow Step. Style: noir, smoke, shadows, blades.

Title: Art: Druid Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Druid: Wild Growth, Animal Companion, Tranquility, Treant, Moonfire. Style: nature, wood, leaves, glowing runes.

Title: Art: Engineer Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Engineer: Repair Bot, Turret, Overclock, Scrap Metal, Bomb. Style: steampunk, gears, sparks, brass.

Title: Art: Ranger Class Cards
Description: Create 5 unique card arts for Ranger: Long Shot, Animal Call, Traps, Swift Strike, Camouflage. Style: forest, arrows, wildlife, mist.

Title: Art: Mana Symbols
Description: Design 5 unique mana symbols: Shadow (cracked obsidian), Steel (forged iron), Life (glowing leaf), Wind (whirlwind), Earth (crystallized stone).

Title: Art: Tutorial UI Elements
Description: Design 5 visual cues for tutorial steps: animated arrow for draw, glowing mana icon, weapon impact effect, deck icon with checkmark, crown icon for win.

Title: Art: Card Back Design
Description: Design one universal card back: swirling nebula with constellation of mana types. No class-specific backs.

Title: Audio: Card Play SFX
Description: Create 5 placeholder SFX: Common card play, Uncommon card play, Rare card play, Spell cast, Combat hit.

Title: Audio: Win/Lose Jingles
Description: Create 2 short music loops: 10s win jingle (uplifting), 10s lose jingle (mellow, reflective).

Title: Audio: Ambient Music
Description: Create 1 loopable 1-minute ambient track: low drone, distant chimes, soft percussion. Plays during match.

Title: Card Schema Validation
Description: Implement schema validator in C++ to validate all 30 cards on load. Reject invalid cards with error message. Log schema mismatch.

Title: Card JSON Storage
Description: Implement card storage system: store all 30 cards as individual JSON files in /cards/ folder. Index in /cards/index.json with version and hash.

Title: Card JSON CDN Deployment
Description: Configure CDN to serve /cards/ folder with cache headers. Enable CORS for WebGL client. Monitor 404s.

Title: Matchmaking Queue Monitoring
Description: Implement Prometheus exporter for Redis queue depth. Add alert for >50 players queued for 30s.

Title: AI State Snapshot Protocol
Description: Implement JSON serializer for game state to send to DGX Spark. Include: hand, board, mana, HP, deck size, turn number, player ID.

Title: AI Response Deserializer
Description: Implement C++ deserializer for AI action responses. Parse JSON array of actions and inject into game loop.

Title: WebGL Build Test
Description: Test WebGL build on iOS Safari, Android Chrome, Windows Firefox, Mac Safari. Measure load time, fps, memory usage. Fix bottlenecks.

Title: WebGL Asset Chunking
Description: Implement asset chunking: preload core assets, load card art and animations on demand. Use Webpack or UE5 streaming.

Title: Save System Encryption
Description: Implement AES-256-GCM encryption for save data using user's OpenArcade JWT token as key. Use CryptoAPI in browser.

Title: Save System Sync Logic
Description: Implement sync logic: client sends last sync timestamp. Server returns changes. Merge client changes on reconnect. Conflict: server wins for core data.

Title: CI/CD Unit Tests
Description: Implement unit tests for card schema, mana system, and game loop in C++. Run on every PR. Require 95% coverage.

Title: CI/CD WebGL Test
Description: Implement GitHub Action that triggers UE5 WebGL build, then runs automated test via Puppeteer. Fail if load time > 5s or fps < 30.

Title: PR Workflow Enforcement
Description: Implement branch protection rule: main branch requires 2 approvals, CI must pass, no force pushes.

Title: PR Reviewer Assignment
Description: Configure GitHub team reviewers: each PR must be assigned to 2 from dev-team and 1 from design-team.

Title: Design: Necromancer Card Balancing
Description: Balance Necromancer cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Design: Warrior Card Balancing
Description: Balance Warrior cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Design: Rogue Card Balancing
Description: Balance Rogue cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Design: Druid Card Balancing
Description: Balance Druid cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Design: Engineer Card Balancing
Description: Balance Engineer cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Design: Ranger Card Balancing
Description: Balance Ranger cards against meta. Ensure no card is overpowered. Validate with simulation engine. Adjust cost/attack/health if needed.

Title: Card Art Finalization
Description: Ensure all 30 card arts meet resolution (2K), transparency, and style guidelines. Submit to dev team for integration.

Title: UI Audio Integration
Description: Integrate placeholder audio files into Blueprint events: card play, attack, win, lose, mana refill.

Title: QA: Tutorial Flow
Description: Test tutorial from start to finish. Ensure no buttons, no menus, no confusion. Each step ends with correct card gift.

Title: QA: Matchmaking Speed
Description: Test matchmaking: 10 test accounts. Confirm 90% match within 15s. Log timeouts.

Title: QA: Mobile Responsiveness
Description: Test UI on 5 devices: iPhone 13, Pixel 7, iPad, Windows tablet, Chromebook. Confirm touch targets, gestures, performance.

Title: QA: Save System Sync
Description: Test save sync: disconnect network, make changes, reconnect. Confirm changes sync correctly. Test conflict resolution.

Title: QA: WebGL Performance
Description: Test WebGL build on 3 low-end devices. Confirm fps > 30, load time < 6s, no crashes.

Title: QA: Card Schema Validation
Description: Test schema validation: corrupt card JSON, load game. Confirm error thrown and game refuses to start.

Title: QA: AI Behavior
Description: Test AI: 10 matches. Confirm it plays reasonably, never overdraws, never cheats, learns after 5 wins.

Title: QA: Audio Looping
Description: Test ambient music and jingles loop cleanly. No clicks, no gaps.

Title: QA: PR Workflow
Description: Test PR workflow: create branch, push, open PR, approve, merge. Confirm branch protection works.

Title: QA: CI/CD Pipeline
Description: Test CI/CD: push to branch, verify unit tests run, WebGL build triggers, staging deploys.

Title: QA: Mobile Audio
Description: Test audio on mobile devices. Confirm sound plays, no mute issues.

Title: QA: Card Art Load
Description: Test card art loads correctly in game. No broken textures, no misalignment.

Title: Design: Mana Balance
Description: Ensure mana system is balanced: no class has a mana type that's too strong or too weak. Adjust if needed.

Title: Design: Class Synergy
Description: Ensure classes have clear counters: Necromancer beats Warrior via lifesteal denial, Warrior beats Rogue via armor, Rogue beats Druid via speed, etc.

Title: Design: Tutorial Difficulty Curve
Description: Ensure tutorial is simple but not patronizing. First step: 10s. Last step: 60s. No frustration.

Title: Design: Win/Loss Feedback
Description: Ensure defeat insight messages are helpful, not discouraging. Your deck lacked tempo control" → good. "You're bad" → bad."

Title: QA: Art Style Consistency
Description: Review all 30 card arts for consistent art style. Fix outliers.

Title: QA: Tutorial Card Gift
Description: Confirm each tutorial step ends with a unique card gift. Cards are added to collection.

Title: QA: AI Deck Selection
Description: Confirm AI uses only cards from player's collection. No new cards appear in AI hand.

Title: QA: Mobile Touch Targets
Description: Confirm all buttons are at least 48x48px on all mobile devices.

Title: QA: Save File Size
Description: Confirm save file < 100KB after 50 cards collected.

Title: QA: CDN Card Load
Description: Confirm card JSON loads from CDN in < 500ms on 3G.

Title: QA: WebSockets Stability
Description: Test WebSocket connection: disconnect and reconnect 10 times. Confirm game state recovers.

Title: QA: Collision Detection
Description: Test card collision: ensure cards don't overlap when played, especially on mobile.

Title: QA: Win/Loss Sound Trigger
Description: Ensure win jingle plays on win, lose jingle plays on loss. No double-play.

Title: QA: Matchmaking Class Preference
Description: Confirm matchmaking respects class preference (if set).

Title: QA: Turn End Animation
Description: Confirm turn end animation plays smoothly and doesn't block input.

Title: QA: Mana Refill
Description: Confirm mana refills exactly 1 of each type per turn. No overshoot, no delay.

Title: QA: No Random Draws
Description: Confirm no card is drawn from deck unless player plays Draw" action. No hidden draws."

Title: QA: Card Rarity Display
Description: Confirm rarity (C/U/R/M) is displayed on card, but doesn't affect power.

Title: QA: Deck Size Limit
Description: Confirm deck can't exceed 40 cards. Can't play 4th copy of a card.

Title: QA: No Mono-Class
Description: Confirm deck must have at least 2 classes. Prevent single-class deck creation.

Title: Design: Card Name Consistency
Description: Ensure all card names follow naming convention: Action + Target or Effect + Type. E.g. Shadow Step" not "Shadow Step Spell"."

Title: Design: Ability Text Clarity
Description: Ensure all card abilities are written in clear, consistent language. No jargon. Easy to read at a glance.

Title: QA: UI Text Scaling
Description: Confirm all UI text scales correctly on mobile and desktop. No clipping.

Title: QA: Card Tooltip"
Description: Ensure card tooltip shows name, cost, attack/health, description, and abilities clearly.

Title: QA: Matchmaking Latency Sorting
Description: Confirm matchmaking prioritizes low-latency players when skill is equal.

Title: QA: Card Animation Sync
Description: Ensure card animations (play, attack, die) play in sync with audio.

Title: QA: Save Load on Reboot
Description: Confirm saved game loads correctly after closing and reopening browser.

Title: QA: No Double-Spend
Description: Confirm you can't spend more mana than you have. No glitches.

Title: QA: Card Art Aspect Ratio
Description: Confirm all card art has correct 3:4 aspect ratio. No stretching.

Title: QA: Audio Volume Balance
Description: Ensure SFX and music volume is balanced. No music drowning out SFX.
